title: Hiring Medical Officer at Sahyadri Hospitals

jsonLd.title: Hiring Medical Officer at Sahyadri Hospitals
jsonLd.description:
Sahyadri Hospitals, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Medical Officer for our Ranchi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Sahyadri Hospitals:
Sahyadri Hospitals is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Infection Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sahyadri Hospitals!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
